title: Duplicate clamp(v, min, max) helper in packages/ctrl (3 copies)
summary: Three byte-identical private clamp(value, min, max) helpers live in the same package (packages/ctrl). useDragControl.ts already houses primitive math alongside snapToStep/normalize but does not export clamp; Stepper and Ribbon each re-declare the same one-line helper. Meets the 3+ rule and stays inside one package boundary.
proposed_action: Promote clamp to a shared util inside packages/ctrl/primitives (e.g. alongside useDragControl.ts or in a new primitives/math.ts), export it, and import from the three call sites. Leave the specialized clampPixelCornerRadii in packages/radiants alone (different signature and domain).

title: Repeated 'fonts.ready then layout' pattern in rad-os pretext views (3 copies)
summary: BookView, BroadsheetView, and EditorialView each implement the same SSR-safe font-ready boilerplate: detect document/fonts support, fall back to Promise.resolve(), await with a cancelled flag, then run a layout computation. The guarded body is the exact same six-line shape in all three files and all three live in the same folder tree (pretext/primitives/*). This does not touch the radiants package; it is a pure within-app helper extraction.
proposed_action: Extract a tiny hook (e.g. apps/rad-os/components/apps/pretext/primitives/shared/useFontsReady.ts or similar) that returns a Promise-or-cancel token and have the three *View.tsx files call it. Manifesto/GoodNews use the bare document.fonts.ready form; leave them unless a second pass proves they benefit.

title: Intentional copy-on-import: rem-to-px root-font-size resolution (rad-os lib, AppWindow core)
summary: Both files convert rem-ish CSS values to px by reading getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize. The code shapes are near-identical but sit on opposite sides of the apps/rad-os <-> packages/radiants copy-on-import boundary. An apparently-similar occurrence in apps/rad-os/components/apps/goodnews/GoodNewsLegacyApp.tsx:142 is a different function (returns root font size, not a rem->px converter).
proposed_action: Do not consolidate across the boundary. Record so a later agent does not flag it again. If the same expression truly repeats inside a single package, revisit then; today it is only 1+1.

title: Intentional copy: templates/rados-app-prototype vs apps/rad-os scaffolding
summary: The templates/rados-app-prototype package is a @rdna/create scaffold template: it is intentionally a clone of the rad-os shape (windowSizing, windowsSlice, useThemeSync/InvertModeProvider dark-class toggle). These duplicates are part of the scaffold contract, not monorepo drift. Surfaced only so later passes do not flag them.
proposed_action: No action. If rad-os changes diverge far enough that the scaffold is broken, regenerate the template via the scaffolder tooling instead of 'consolidating'.

title: Intentional copy-on-import: ResizeObserver usages across packages and app (no app/package consolidation)
summary: ResizeObserver appears across many files but each call site observes a semantically different target (single container width+height, toolbar height, canvas renderer, single-width goodnews column). Within apps/rad-os only two places (useContainerSize + GoodNewsLegacyApp) observe a simple size and useContainerSize already exists as a public hook; 2 usages is below the 3+ threshold. Cross-boundary usages (app vs core components, ctrl canvas renderer) are copy-on-import by rule. No consolidation proposed.
proposed_action: Report-only. If GoodNewsLegacyApp survives future cleanup, consider adopting useContainerSize there for consistency, but that is a single-file rewrite, not a DRY refactor.
